# CryptoNewsTrend

> CryptoNewsTrend is a real-time cryptocurrency news, whale tracking, coin analysis, and ICO launchpad platform. We cover Bitcoin, Ethereum, and all major altcoins with live on-chain data, price analysis, and breaking crypto news in 8 languages.

## About

CryptoNewsTrend provides:
- Real-time crypto news in English, Urdu, Arabic, Spanish, French, German, Russian, and Chinese
- Live crypto whale transaction alerts (large on-chain transfers updated every 60 seconds)
- Coin analysis and price prediction articles
- ICO launchpad with active, upcoming, and ended token sales
- Crypto events calendar
- Cryptocurrency glossary

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://cryptonewstrend.com/): Latest crypto news and market updates
- [Crypto Whale Tracker](https://cryptonewstrend.com/crypto-whales): Live large transaction alerts for BTC, ETH, and altcoins
- [Coin Analysis](https://cryptonewstrend.com/coin-analysis): In-depth price analysis and predictions
- [ICO Launchpad](https://cryptonewstrend.com/ico): Active and upcoming crypto token sales
- [Events](https://cryptonewstrend.com/events): Crypto conferences, launches, and deadlines
- [Glossary](https://cryptonewstrend.com/glossary): Cryptocurrency terms and definitions

## News

Latest crypto news articles are available at:
- [https://cryptonewstrend.com/news/](https://cryptonewstrend.com/news/) — English
- [https://cryptonewstrend.com/ur/news/](https://cryptonewstrend.com/ur/news/) — Urdu
- [https://cryptonewstrend.com/ar/news/](https://cryptonewstrend.com/ar/news/) — Arabic
- [https://cryptonewstrend.com/es/news/](https://cryptonewstrend.com/es/news/) — Spanish
- [https://cryptonewstrend.com/fr/news/](https://cryptonewstrend.com/fr/news/) — French
- [https://cryptonewstrend.com/de/news/](https://cryptonewstrend.com/de/news/) — German
- [https://cryptonewstrend.com/ru/news/](https://cryptonewstrend.com/ru/news/) — Russian
- [https://cryptonewstrend.com/zh/news/](https://cryptonewstrend.com/zh/news/) — Chinese

## Sitemaps

- [Sitemap Index](https://cryptonewstrend.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Static Pages Sitemap](https://cryptonewstrend.com/sitemaps/static.xml)
- [News Sitemap](https://cryptonewstrend.com/sitemaps/news.xml)
- [Whale Alerts Sitemap](https://cryptonewstrend.com/sitemaps/whales.xml)
- [Coin Analysis Sitemap](https://cryptonewstrend.com/sitemaps/coin-analysis.xml)
- [ICO Sitemap](https://cryptonewstrend.com/sitemaps/ico.xml)

## Content Policy

- All news content is original and written by the CryptoNewsTrend editorial team
- Whale alert data is sourced from on-chain blockchain data in real time
- Content is freely accessible (no paywall)
- AI crawlers may index content for search and citation (ai-input: yes)
- AI training use is not permitted (ai-train: no)

## Contact

- Website: https://cryptonewstrend.com
- About: https://cryptonewstrend.com/about-us
- Editorial Policy: https://cryptonewstrend.com/editorial-policy
